meta.description: Slicer specialization (Technician career). 30 talent cards: 10 Tier 1, 8 Tier 2, 6 Tier 3, 4 Tier 4, 2 Tier 5. Players draft 15 into a pyramid (5/4/3/2/1).

specialization.name: Slicer
specialization.description: A master hacker who infiltrates computer systems, bypasses security, and weaponizes technology. The Slicer turns the enemy's own systems against them, opening doors, disabling defenses, and extracting critical intelligence.

talents.name: Grit
talents.description: Increase Strain Threshold by 1 per rank.

talents.name: Toughened
talents.description: Increase Wound Threshold by 2 per rank.

talents.name: Codebreaker
talents.description: Remove 1 Setback die per rank from Computers checks to break encryption or access secured systems.

talents.name: Second Wind
talents.description: Once per encounter, recover strain equal to ranks in Second Wind.

talents.name: Quick Draw
talents.description: Once per round, draw or holster a weapon as an incidental instead of a maneuver.

talents.name: Bypass Security
talents.description: Remove 1 Setback die per rank from checks to disable security devices or open locked doors.

talents.name: Defensive Stance
talents.description: Once per round, as a maneuver, upgrade the difficulty of all melee attacks targeting you by 1 per rank until the start of your next turn.

talents.name: Resolve
talents.description: Remove 1 Setback die per rank from Discipline and Cool checks.

talents.name: Durable
talents.description: Subtract 10 per rank from critical injury rolls against you (minimum 1).

talents.name: Technical Aptitude
talents.description: Remove 1 Setback die per rank from Computers and Mechanics checks.

talents.name: Defensive Slicing
talents.description: When defending against computer intrusion, add 1 Setback die per rank to the opponent's check.

talents.name: Point Blank
talents.description: Add 1 damage per rank to one attack per round when firing a ranged weapon at Short range or closer.

talents.name: Bought Time
talents.description: On your turn, suffer 2 strain to perform an additional maneuver.

talents.name: Side Step
talents.description: Once per round, as a maneuver, upgrade the difficulty of ranged attacks targeting you by 1 per rank until the start of your next turn.

talents.name: Enduring
talents.description: Increase Soak by 1 per rank.

talents.name: Lethal Blows
talents.description: Add +10 per rank to critical injury rolls inflicted on opponents.

talents.name: Natural Programmer
talents.description: Once per session, reroll one Computers or Mechanics check.

talents.name: Shortcut
talents.description: Remove 1 Setback die per rank from Athletics and Coordination checks during chases.

talents.name: Improved Defensive Slicing
talents.description: Defensive Slicing also upgrades the difficulty of the opponent's check by 1.

talents.name: True Aim
talents.description: Once per round, use a maneuver to gain +1 Boost die per rank on your next ranged attack this turn.

talents.name: Heroic Resilience
talents.description: Once per session, when you would be incapacitated by wounds, make a Hard Resilience check. On success, remain conscious with 1 wound remaining.

talents.name: Crippling Blow
talents.description: Increase the difficulty of your next combat check by 1. If you deal a critical, add +10 to the roll.

talents.name: Armor Master
talents.description: When wearing armor, increase total Soak by 1.

talents.name: Feral Strength
talents.description: Add 1 damage to one Brawl or Melee attack per round.

talents.name: Deadly Accuracy
talents.description: When making a ranged attack, add ranks in the weapon's skill as bonus damage to one hit.

talents.name: Unstoppable
talents.description: Once per session, perform a bonus action during your turn. Suffer 4 strain.

talents.name: Master Slicer
talents.description: Once per encounter, reduce the difficulty of a Computers check by 2 (minimum 1).

talents.name: Iron Body
talents.description: Reduce strain suffered from voluntary maneuvers and actions by 1 per rank (minimum 1).

talents.name: Dedication (Intellect)
talents.description: Permanently increase Intellect by 1.

talents.name: Dedication (Cunning)
talents.description: Permanently increase Cunning by 1.
